title: lantana viburnoides var. kisi
intro: Lantana viburnoides var. kisi, also known as Kisi Lantana or Kisi Viburnum, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Lantana viburnoides var. kisi can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, allowing for a range of applications and uses.
